intro: 2026 outlook — built on each team's kept players heading into the Aug 23 draft, weighted by 2025 form. Regenerated on request.

ranking.note: The best keeper haul in the league: Ja'Marr Chase and CeeDee Lamb at WR, Jahmyr Gibbs and Derrick Henry at RB. Two elite anchors at each spot, on a three-time championship franchise. Clear #1.
Reigning champ reloads: Josh Allen at QB, Bijan Robinson and Breece Hall in the backfield, Puka Nacua at WR. Elite at every position and coming off the 2025 title.
A monster RB room — Christian McCaffrey, Ashton Jeanty and Omarion Hampton — plus WR1 Nico Collins. The league's best regular-season manager with the depth to match.
Justin Jefferson and Jonathan Taylor are two of the surest points in fantasy, with Marvin Harrison Jr and young QB Drake Maye behind them. Kept haul far outshines the middling record.
Lamar Jackson plus two elite WRs in Amon-Ra St. Brown and Malik Nabers, with Chase Brown for RB volume. A 2023 champ with a high-floor core.
De'Von Achane and Trey McBride are positional difference-makers; Rashee Rice and rookie Emeka Egbuka give WR upside. Backs up a league-best 11-3 in 2025.
Keepers punch well above the franchise's history: A.J. Brown, Drake London and rookie Tetairoa McMillan at WR, James Cook at RB. Best value relative to reputation.
Joe Burrow, Josh Jacobs, Brian Thomas Jr and Travis Etienne is a balanced, proven core — enough to arrest the recent slide if the draft goes well.
Jaxon Smith-Njigba and Kyren Williams headline, with Ladd McConkey and rookie Quinshon Judkins for upside. Solid but a tier below the contenders.
Brock Bowers is a positional cheat code and Bucky Irving broke out, but George Pickens and Chris Olave are boom-or-bust. Needs a strong draft.
Saquon Barkley is a genuine anchor and DeVonta Smith is steady, but the other keepers (rookies Henderson and Loveland) are projection. Top-heavy.
The lightest keeper group — Kenneth Walker and an aging Mike Evans lead it, with rookie Cam Skattebo and Alec Pierce as dart throws. Most reliant on the draft.
